authorCommits.message:
chore: ensure tags spec restores resource items on failure (#4461)

* chore: ensure tags spec restores resource items even on failure

Move `restore_items_from_backup` calls from the end of test bodies into
`ensure` clauses so that class-level `temporary_items` state is cleaned
up even when an expectation fails. Without this, a failure leaves the
resource with a leaked block, which `detect_fields` then `instance_eval`s
in subsequent tests, masking the real default fields and causing
cascading failures.

The `format_using ... fetches the labels` test is intentionally left
untouched because the next test relies on its leaked state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Apply suggestion from @Paul-Bob

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Paul Bob <69730720+Paul-Bob@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: remove invalid style: 'hidden' from filter url_redirect links (#4456)

The `style: 'hidden'` option generates an invalid `style="hidden"`
attribute. The links already have `class: 'hidden'` to hide them via
CSS, so the style attribute is redundant and has no effect.
